Hi Murielle, I am Liam, from the Australia office. So, what does your team actually do here?
Hi Liam, welcome! I oversee the HR business partner team. We support the corporate areas.
Nice. Who do you report to?
I report to the people director. I also liaise with the managers in Brazil and Chile.
Got it. Does your team handle compensation?
Yes, we handle compensation, and we also recruit and retain talent.
That is a lot. Is it always the same process?
It depends on the business unit. Let us talk again this week.
I oversee a team of HR business partners.
I liaise with managers in different countries.
I report directly to the people director.
My role involves compensation and recruitment.
It depends on the business unit.

Hi Murielle, it's Liam from the Australia office. Welcome to the global people team. Let me give you a quick picture of how we work. The HR business partners usually start the week with a short call on Monday morning. During the week, we handle compensation, we support the corporate areas, and we track the turnover numbers closely. We rarely make big changes on Fridays, because we always keep that day for reviews and planning. You report to the people director, and you liaise with the local managers here in Sydney. When something urgent happens, we send a quick message and sort it out. It is a busy team, but a strong one. I am sure you will fit right in. Talk soon.

Good morning, team. This is a short update from the people department. This quarter, we focus on two things: we recruit new talent for the operations in Chile, and we work hard to retain our key people in Brazil. The managers usually send their headcount reports by Wednesday. Remember, our goal is sustainable people management across every business unit. If you have questions about compensation or the salary grade, please contact your HR business partner. Thank you, and have a great week.
